definition:
1. opposite to ψιλός in all senses: 
2. thick with hair, hairy, shaggy, rough , (Odyssey by Homer); of young hares, downy , (Herdotus Historicus) 
3. thick with leaves , (Odyssey by Homer); θρίδαξ δασέα a lettuce with all the leaves  on, (Herdotus Historicus):—;of places, thick with bushes  or wood , (Odyssey by Homer); διὰ τῶν δασέων through the copses , (Aristophanes Comicus); δ. ὕληι thick  with copse-wood, (Herdotus Historicus), etc.; rarely with genitive, δασὺς δένδρων (Xenophon Historicus):—; τὸ δασύ bushy country , (Xenophon Historicus) (ML)
